next_priority: Task 3: Write Lean 4 formal spec for ArgumentArity — requires Lean toolchain to be available. Plan: write ArgumentArity.lean with structure definition, 5 predefined constants, 14 theorem stubs (4 groups), attempt decide proofs for predefined constant properties. Needs network access to download elan/Lean toolchain.

approach.rationale: Pure functions, clear algebraic properties, well-documented POSIX/CLI conventions

findings.description: Constructor does not enforce Min <= Max invariant. Ill-formed arities silently accepted. ValidateOptionsArgumentArity may produce misleading error messages for Min > Max inputs.

lean_formal_spec_plan.structure: structure ArgumentArity where min : Int; max : Int
theorems: theorem predefined_nonneg_min : for all c in predefined list, c.min >= 0
theorem predefined_wellformed : for all c in predefined list, c.min <= c.max
theorem eq_reflexive : for all a, a = a
theorem eq_symmetric : for all a b, a = b -> b = a
theorem eq_transitive : for all a b c, a = b -> b = c -> a = c
theorem eq_extensional : for all a b, a = b iff a.min = b.min and a.max = b.max
theorem predefined_distinct : all 5 predefined constants are pairwise distinct
lean_formal_spec_plan.approach: Use Int for min/max. Model Int32.MaxValue as 2147483647 concrete value. Use decide for concrete theorems about predefined constants.
